description: Named plugin bundles for /plugin install. Resolves the lack of native cross-plugin dependency declaration in Claude Code by letting the install-bundle slash command install a curated set in one shot.

bundles.name: skills-full
bundles.description: Recommended. All distributable plugins: the end-user business outcomes (contract-generator, mf-kessai-invoice-check, company-master, notion-gmail-send) plus the governance foundation and the non-engineer intake flow.

bundles.name: skills-intake
bundles.description: Non-engineer elicitation flow that turns plain-language requests into Notion-published briefs, backed by Keychain secrets management.
